# Create room design and interior decor in 2D & 3D  without any special skills

Simple 3D room planner for interior design

used already by 127 973 081 homeowners

Start from scratchSmart WizardImport a planTemplates [Hire a designer](https://planner5d.com/go?from=welcome_screen&to=https%3A%2F%2Fplanner5d.pro%2Fwizard%3Fcohort%3DIDA%26utm_medium%3Dinternal%26utm_source%3Dplanner_hire_designer%26utm_campaign%3Dplanner_landing_experts)

Templates

## Recognize plan from image

### Uploading requirements:

- We accept .png, .jpg, .pdf, .bmp, .pbm, .pgm, .ppm, .pnm, .sun, .cmu, .tiff, .dxf, .dwg, .dib
- Make sure you upload architectural/blueprint-like images.
- Feel free to upload blueprint photos and screenshots.
- Good-quality images ensure faster and better convert.
- If the furniture is not recognized properly, choose an object from the rich Planner 5D collection to replace it.

metadata.ogDescription: Home design is easy. Design your room in 3D right on your browser with a Planner 5D online service. Draw a sketch of your space, and get an instant room design idea.
